calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-302 suffering-derivative comparator substrate readiness (4-arm)
items.note: Substrate readiness diagnostic: unit tests (synthetic sequences) + integration smoke. Validates SufferingDerivativeComparator fires, bit-identical OFF, sim-mode gate (MECH-094), min_initial_norm gate. 4 arms: OFF / window=3,t=0.05 / window=5,t=0.10 / window=10,t=0.20.
